plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode that strips filler words to cut token usage.

plugins.name: simple-memory
plugins.description: Reference memory plugin that exercises the full plugin API with low-cost variants of Vellum's memory defaults.

plugins.name: dynamic-notch
plugins.description: Put your Vellum assistant inside your MacBook's notch: click to chat, hold Ctrl+Option to talk, and get a floating task bulb while it works, with live-streamed replies and per-sentence voice.

plugins.name: level-up
plugins.description: Surfaces a first-class "Level Up" diff card whenever the assistant edits its own skills or plugins, so you can see how it improved itself after the fact.

plugins.name: model-router
plugins.description: Routes each user-facing message to one of your workspace's inference profiles, so model selection can vary per call instead of staying pinned to a single profile.

plugins.name: marketing-expert
plugins.description: Acts as a full-stack marketing expert for any business (B2B or B2C): an on-demand persona plus playbook skills (positioning, demand plan, launch, content, GEO, competitive teardown, board report) and deterministic funnel/positioning/GTM/competitive tools.
